message: Operation 'approveallassignments' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too vague about scope and effects. Added clarity that only pending assignments are affected, what is returned (summary with count), and use case context. This helps AI agents understand this is a bulk operation and when it's appropriate to use versus individual approval.

data.current_description: Approve all assignments for a project.
data.description_suggestion: Approves all pending assignments for a specified project in a single operation. Transitions all assignments with pending status to active status. Returns a summary of approved assignments including count and list of updated Assignment objects. This is a bulk operation useful for project kickoff or batch approval workflows.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague about scope and effects. Added clarity that only pending assignments are affected, what is returned (summary with count), and use case context. This helps AI agents understand this is a bulk operation and when it's appropriate to use versus individual approval.

message: Operation 'finalapproveproject' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks critical context about prerequisites (all assignments must be approved), what final approval means (locked/closed state), and what operations become unavailable. Added these details so AI agents understand this is a terminal state operation with prerequisites and consequences.

data.current_description: Give final approval to a project.
data.description_suggestion: Applies final approval to a project, marking it as complete and locked for further modifications. Requires all assignments to be approved first. Returns the updated Project object with final approval status and timestamp. Once final approval is applied, the project cannot be edited and moves to closed state for archival or reporting.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical context about prerequisites (all assignments must be approved), what final approval means (locked/closed state), and what operations become unavailable. Added these details so AI agents understand this is a terminal state operation with prerequisites and consequences.

message: Operation 'archiveproject' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too minimal about the purpose and effects of archiving. Added context about when archiving occurs (after final approval), what happens to data (preserved), visibility changes (excluded from active lists), and query availability (still accessible for reporting). This helps AI agents understand archiving as a data lifecycle operation.

data.current_description: Archive a project.
data.description_suggestion: Archives a completed project, moving it out of active view while preserving all historical data. Typically applied after final approval. Returns the updated Project object with archived status. Archived projects remain queryable for reporting and audit purposes but are excluded from active project lists and cannot be modified.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal about the purpose and effects of archiving. Added context about when archiving occurs (after final approval), what happens to data (preserved), visibility changes (excluded from active lists), and query availability (still accessible for reporting). This helps AI agents understand archiving as a data lifecycle operation.
